personality_one_liner: A sleek, command-center utility calculator driven by sharp typography, tactical metrics, and OLED-friendly neon purple accents.

spacing.rule: Use precise, tight spacing for dense calculation states. Leverage dividers and tonal shifts over margins to group inputs.

dont's: Do not use glass or blur effects in Dark-First Utility

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Live tip calculator, input interface, and primary metric display.

states.loading: Spinner in the center of the dark OLED screen.
states.error: Toast with error (e.g. invalid amount) and a dismiss option.

screens.layout: Stack layout. Top: 'Live Results Card' showcasing huge Rajdhani metrics for Total/Person and Tip/Person. Middle: 'Bill Amount' input field (extra large text, native numeric keyboard) paired with an inline 'Currency Picker' trigger button. Lower: Dense grid/row of tip percentage chips (10, 15, 18, 20, 25, custom). Next: Stepper for 'Number of People' and a sharp toggle switch for 'Round Up'. Bottom: Sticky 'Reset' button and a link/icon to view 'History'.

screens.name: Currency Picker Modal
screens.purpose: Fast, searchable selection of 150+ world currencies.

states.empty: No results found state with a subtle neon purple accented illustration/icon.

screens.layout: Bottom sheet modal (@gorhom/bottom-sheet). Top header: title and close button. Next: Search bar (surfaceTertiary background). Body: Scrollable list of currencies. Each row: Flag emoji (left), Currency Code + Name (center), Checkmark if selected (right). Very dense and scannable list.

screens.name: History

states.empty: Centered abstract neon purple texture background with 'No past splits' message.

screens.layout: Standard stack screen with a back button. Vertical list of past splits (cards displaying Date, Total Bill, Tip %, Total/Person, and People count). Strict dividers between list items. Uses AsyncStorage.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility personality (sharp, flat, OLED-friendly). Do not use soft glassmorphism; use sharp borders (border/borderStrong) and tonal elevation.
The primary accent is Neon Purple (#A78BFA). Use it sparingly for selected chips, the Round Up toggle active state, and key highlights.
Use 'Rajdhani' for all numbers and metrics. Use 'DM Sans' for labels, body text, and buttons. Make sure weight caps at 500.
For the Currency Picker, the user explicitly requested flag emojis. This is the ONLY place where emojis are permitted.
Ensure 'Round Up' toggles logic correctly affects the total and persists preference via AsyncStorage.
When a user selects a tip percentage, highlight that chip with brandPrimary background and onBrandPrimary text.
Implement the 'History' screen to read/write past calculations from AsyncStorage.
Add a vertical gradient scrim over the 'history_empty_state_bg' image if it is used, fading from transparent to surface Inverse at the bottom, per the zero tolerance Imagery_and_Texture rule.
